items.title: PSV clinch 3rd-straight Eredivisie in record time
items.summary: PSV Eindhoven were crowned Eredivisie champion for a third straight year and 27th time overall after their closest rival Feyenoord failed to win on Sunday.

items.title: Man City expect Silva's story coming 'to an end'
items.summary: Manchester City assistant Pep Lijnders has given the strongest hint yet that Bernardo Silva is set to leave the club at the end of the season by saying "every good story comes to an end."

items.title: FA Cup draw: City-Southampton; Chelsea-Leeds
items.summary: Manchester City will face Southampton in the FA Cup semifinal, while Chelsea will meet Leeds United.

items.title: Balogun fires Monaco to win amid late UCL push
items.summary: Folarin Balogun proved decisive for Monaco to extend their winning run in Ligue 1 to seven matches as they earned a 2-1 victory over fellow Champions League chasers Marseille.

items.title: Palmer: Chelsea captaincy a 'long time coming'
items.summary: Cole Palmer said it had been a "long time coming" after he was handed the Chelsea captaincy for the first time in Saturday's FA Cup mauling of Port Vale.

items.title: 'We have written history but greedy to go to the next step'
items.summary: After a 39-year absence, Leeds are back in the FA Cup semi-finals, with the supporters dreaming of a trophy after a dramatic win over West Ham.

items.title: Samenvatting: Feyenoord loopt schade op in Volendam
items.summary: Feyenoord staat nog altijd tweede in de Eredivisie, maar liet op bezoek bij FC Volendam na om die positie te verstevigen. Het team van Robin van Persie maakte eigenlijk ook weinig aanspraak op meer dan 0-0 aan De Dijk.

items.title: Samenvatting: PSV in spektakelstuk langs FC Utrecht
items.summary: PSV heeft zaterdag in een heerlijk spektakelstuk afgerekend met FC Utrecht. In Eindhoven kwam de ploeg van Ron Jans sterk voor de dag, maar de Brabanders trokken toch aan het langste eind. Een dag later bleek deze zege te volstaan voor de landstitel.

items.title: Samenvatting: sterk FC Twente wint in Amsterdam van Ajax
items.summary: FC Twente heeft zaterdag uitstekende zaken gedaan in de strijd om Champions League-voetbal. De ploeg van John van den Brom won in de Johan Cruijff Arena van Ajax. De Amsterdammers moeten alle zeilen bijzetten om zich de mannen uit Enschede van het lijf te houden.

items.title: Lijnders bevestigt transfervrij vertrek van Manchester City-icoon
items.summary: Bernardo Silva gaat Manchester City transfervrij verlaten. Dat hing al in de lucht, en is nu ook bevestigd door assistent-manager Pepijn Lijnders.

items.title: Struijk schiet Leeds naar de halve finale: 'Ik haalde diep adem en scoorde'
items.summary: Pascal Struijk kan niet wachten om tegen Chelsea aan te treden in de halve finale van de FA Cup. Het is voor het eerst dat de verdediger van Leeds United op Wembley zal gaan spelen.

items.title: Lijnders hints at Man City departure for Silva
items.summary: Manchester City assistant manager Pep Lijnders hints that midfielder Bernardo Silva's could be leaving in the summer.

items.title: Bernardo Silva will leave Manchester City this summer, reveals Pep Lijnders
items.summary: Captain deserves good farewell, says assistant manager Silva has interest from Barcelona as contract ends in June Pep Lijnders has revealed that Bernardo Silva will leave Manchester City in the summer, with the assistant manager hoping the captain is given a fitting farewell. The 31-year-old Silva, whose contract expires in June, has been in impressive form this season but Lijnders stated it will be his last for City. Continue reading...

items.title: Was 11 minutes of stoppage time at West Ham excessive?
items.summary: There were 11 minutes of stoppage time at the end of the second half of West Ham's FA Cup quarter-final against Leeds - but was that an excessive or an explainable amount of added time?

items.title: Leeds hold nerve to win shootout after West Ham’s dramatic fightback
items.summary: The familiar London Stadium rush for the exit has never been so misjudged. A lot of West Ham fans decided they had seen enough when Dominic Calvert-Lewin put Leeds 2-0 up and within touching distance of a first FA Cup semi-final since 1987, but how wrong they were. The non-believers reckoned without their side forcing extra time and were not allowed back in to see a ridiculous game go the distance. It ended with Finlay Herrick, a 20-year-old goalkeeper whose experience of senior football extended no further than 10 games during a loan spell with National League side Boreham Wood earlier this season, coming on for his West Ham debut after Alphonse Areola went off injured just before penalties. Talk about a baptism of fire. Herrick is West Ham’s No 3 goalkeeper and it seemed he was about to steal the headlines when he opened the shootout by saving a tame effort from Joël Piroe. Continue reading...

items.title: Arteta’s ChatGPT Guardiola-ism is down but history beckons for Gunners
items.summary: The quadruple dream may be dead but Arsenal are now just four games from achieving an unprecedented nonruple And then there were two. As the clock ticked down at St Mary’s Stadium on Saturday night even the stray yellow balloons on the pitch had begun to take on a weirdly mocking quality. The balloons were almost too much, like metaphors-for-hire in an arthouse film, popping up in shot every time Arsenal tried to transform another spell of mechanical pressure into creative, incisive football. Your dreams? Your dreams are just air inside a polymer shell. Your dreams are a squeaky veneer. Even when you try to take agency over your dreams, or at least stamp on them before a set piece, they will scoot away and bobble about annoyingly near the corner flag. Continue reading...

items.title: Leeds draw Chelsea, Man City face Southampton in FA Cup semis
items.summary: Leeds United will play Chelsea at Wembley after reaching the FA Cup semi-finals for the first time in almost four decades, while Manchester City take on Southampton.

items.title: Scottish Premiership: Hearts back on top but drop points in Livingston draw
items.summary: Hearts point clear of Rangers with six games left Celtic stay in contention with 2-1 win at Dundee Hearts reclaimed their status as Scottish Premiership leaders but missed the chance to restore their three‑point cushion after being held to a 2-2 draw by the bottom side, Livingston. The Jambos had been knocked off the top for the first time since September after Rangers edged ahead of them on goal difference by defeating Dundee United on Saturday. Continue reading...

items.title: Brighton stun Arsenal in Women’s FA Cup shock; Liverpool also through to last four
items.summary: Brighton two wins away from first major trophy Liverpool edge out Charlton in extra time Arsenal made a surprise exit at the quarter-final stage of the Women’s FA Cup for the second successive season as Brighton stunned the record 14-time cup winners at Borehamwood. Liverpool managed to avoid it becoming a day of shocks as they struck late in extra time to eventually find a way past a stubborn Charlton Athletic side, but they was no such joy for Arsenal, who paid the price for a performance that was well below their best. Continue reading...

items.title: Is the Championship heading for financial 'catastrophe'?
items.summary: BBC Sport takes a look at if the second tier could be facing a "doomsday scenario" as club accounts reveal the significant scale of their losses.

items.title: 🎥 "Het is ongelooflijk": nieuwe assist, maar ook weer een flinke tegenvaller voor Mika Godts
items.summary: Zaterdag werd Mika Godts de eerste speler die dit seizoen in de Eredivisie een 'double-double' haalde. Veertien goals en tien assists: de Rode Duivel is in bloedvorm, maar moest wel de nieuwe nederlaag van Ajax tegen Twente vaststellen.

items.title: "Je suis peut-être bizarre" : Wout Faes se confie sur son choix de vie peu commun dans le monde actuel
items.summary: Wout Faes s'est confié au micro de L'Équipe sur son choix de s'éloigner des réseaux sociaux. Le Diable Rouge a choisi une vie sans aucun réseau social.

items.title: "M. Verboomen est venu s'excuser" : Hans Cornelis très frustré après la défaite de Charleroi
items.summary: Hans Cornelis s'est exprimé au micro de DAZN après la défaite des Zèbres contre Westerlo (2-0). L'entraîneur est déçu et se sent lésé par l'arbitrage.

items.title: Simon Mignolet bij de KBVB: Franky Van der Elst wil er nog wat over kwijt
items.summary: Simon Mignolet stopt na dit seizoen als profvoetballer, maar verdwijnt niet uit het voetbal. De doelman van Club Brugge begint straks aan een nieuwe rol, en dat stemt ook Franky Van der Elst bijzonder positief.

items.title: 🎥 Lukaku en De Bruyne inspireren plots ook... Jannik Sinner en Zizou Bergs
items.summary: Romelu Lukaku en Kevin De Bruyne inspireerden de hele wereld op die avond in 2014, tijdens België - Verenigde Staten. Twaalf jaar later doet de beste Belgische tennisser, Zizou Bergs, die iconische viering nog eens over met... de nummer twee van de wereld, Jannik Sinner.

items.title: "Son rôle est très important" : Sébastien Pocognoli se confie sur sa relation avec son président
items.summary: Après des débuts compliqués, Sébastien Pocognoli commence à s'installer à l'AS Monaco. L'entraîneur belge s'est exprimé sur sa relation avec le président du club français, Dmitri Rybolovlev.

items.title: Verboomen excuseert zich voor rode kaart, Charleroi woedend: "Echt ridicuul, hier kan je niet mee leven"
items.summary: De rode kaart voor Etienne Camara was een van de opvallendste fases van het weekend. De middenvelder van Charleroi kreeg zijn tweede geel na een korte opmerking tegen scheidsrechter Nathan Verboomen.

items.title: Les sommes immenses touchées par Ronaldo, Messi, Mbappé et Vinicius pour la fameuse publicité LEGO
items.summary: La publicité de LEGO avec Vinicius Junior, Kylian Mbappé, Lionel Messi et Cristiano Ronaldo a certes fait le buzz, mais elle a coûté très cher à la marque de jouets de construction.

items.title: Du Beerschot à finaliste de la Ligue des champions : Victor Wanyama met un terme à sa carrière
items.summary: Victor Wanyama a annoncé mettre un terme à sa carrière de footballeur professionnel dans la nuit de vendredi à samedi.

items.title: Ngoy en Meunier helpen Lille aan belangrijke zege: Franse pers heeft duidelijke mening
items.summary: Nathan Ngoy en Thomas Meunier hebben zaterdagavond hun steentje bijgedragen aan de zege van Lille tegen Lens. Beide Rode Duivels zetten een sterke prestatie neer, zoals ook verschillende Franse media benadrukken.
